stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, manifest, prompt, or selector change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent refrozen-seal Orchid review passed against the exact 719c0074 manifest. All 596 frozen fixtures and 696 independently authored fresh probes produced the expected real-engine outcomes across all 24 candidates. Fresh probes covered equivalent fences, longer closers, language tags, CRLF and CR-only line endings, blockquote and list containers, fence-looking literal final lines, raw-NUL replacement handling, literal U+FFFD, NUL plus visible text, invisible-only content, parser lookalikes, exact Level 2 anatomy, and prose-neutral variants. No candidate target equals its teaching example; the previous door-sign, bus-reference, and alarm-routine example collisions are absent. No ID, target, contentVariant, or full-vocabulary collision existed against the 272 accepted problems. Across 256 seeds and 48 turns, every new Level 2 variant was reachable by turn 5 with no adjacent-family, duplicate-turn, or determinism violation. The full 9,105-test suite, focused 809-test regressions, typecheck, and prepublication gate passed with no blocking findings.
